raise_heat_press_handle.query: the worker lifts the orange-gripped handle of the heat press and opens the upper platen

remove_white_fabric_from_heat_press.query: the worker pulls a white fabric item out from under the open heat press, moves it to the right worktable, and spreads it out

separate_white_fabric_from_stack.query: the worker pinches the edge of one white fabric item from the stack on the left, separates it, and lifts it

align_and_fold_white_fabric_on_table.query: the worker places the white fabric item on the center worktable, folds it over with both hands, and aligns its edges
